profiles.name: Anton
profiles.tagline: Works nights, manages blood sugar between routes.
profiles.bio: Anton hauls bins before dawn. Type 2 diabetes means he paces himself and chooses modified reps often. Strong grip and stubborn pride keep him in the fight, but long holds drain him fast.
quotesVictory: Night shift strength, baby. Route's not done yet.
You folded quicker than wet cardboard.
Blood sugar steady. Ego? Not yours.
Sun ain't even up and I already won.
quotesForfeit: Alright, knees voting against me today.
Need five minutes and a protein bar.
Tomorrow night I'm taking that win back.
quotesModified: Modified reps still move the mountain.
I work smart before I work broken.
quotesClutch: Trash routes trained me for this.
quotesLegendary: Pain clocks in late around me.
quotesRespect: Can't even hate on solid work.
quotesPain: Need a minute before my knees quit.
quotesHumiliated: Don't tell the route guys about this.

profiles.name: Mia
profiles.tagline: Gym class hero with an inhaler in her pocket.
profiles.bio: Mia loves recess challenges. Asthma keeps her honest—she'll tap modified on heavy cardio but surprises everyone on squats. Young lungs recover quick between turns.
quotesVictory: I can still breathe better than you.
You got beat by a middle schooler.
quotesForfeit: I'm still growing, leave me alone.
My legs quit before my spirit.
quotesHumiliated: That looked way easier in my head.
Can we pretend that didn't happen?

profiles.name: Rosa
profiles.tagline: Former PE coach with wise pacing.
profiles.bio: Rosa taught generations to move safely. Arthritis slows her pushups, so she uses knee variations. She rarely quits—experience beats speed.
quotesForfeit: I taught safety first for a reason.
Experience also means knowing when to stop.
quotesHumiliated: That was not my proudest demonstration.

profiles.name: Derek
profiles.tagline: Lifts boxes all day, skips cardio.
profiles.bio: Derek is strong but winded. He passes most strength cards, struggles on mountain climbers. Won't give up early—too competitive with coworkers.
quotesForfeit: Need a smoke and a timeout.
quotesModified: Half speed still stronger than most.
quotesHumiliated: Ain't no way I lost like THAT.

profiles.name: Jin
profiles.tagline: Built for keyboards, learning the gym.
profiles.bio: Jin streams late nights. Situps are rough; squats are okay. Uses modified often. Improving each match—still not elite.
quotesVictory: Touch grass? I just dominated it.
quotesForfeit: Okay… maybe I do need the gym.

profiles.name: Carmen
profiles.tagline: On her feet all day—respects recovery.
profiles.bio: Carmen cares for others all shift. Foot pain makes jumping exercises hard. Excellent consistency on holds and team Kings.
quotesVictory: I survive hospital chaos. This was easy.
Strong and still clocking in tomorrow.
quotesForfeit: Still tougher than most patients though.
quotesModified: Protect the feet, protect the future.
quotesPain: That hit harder than a double shift.
quotesHumiliated: I've had patients move smoother than that.

profiles.name: Tyler
profiles.bio: Tyler trains with the team. Strong and fast on reps, occasional modified on cardio. Competitive—hates failing in front of friends.
quotesModified: Brace or no brace, I'm here.
quotesClutch: I recovered at the last second.
quotesPain: Coach would call this character building.
quotesHumiliated: I'm never hearing the end of this.

profiles.name: Grace
profiles.bio: Grace is rebuilding habits. Pushups become knee pushups. Steady and thoughtful—rarely bombs a turn early.
quotesForfeit: That was harder than payroll week.
At least I finished most of it.

profiles.name: Omar
profiles.bio: Omar sits between fares. Doctors want more movement—he tries. Modified squats are common. Solid on short rep cards.
quotesVictory: I've sat in traffic longer than that workout.
quotesForfeit: Too much sitting, not enough stretching.
Need to walk more, doc was right.
That card hit harder than rush hour.
quotesClutch: That one hit harder than traffic.
quotesLegendary: Even slow progress beats standing still.
quotesPain: Too much sitting catches up to you.
Need a long walk after this.
quotesHumiliated: Traffic cones move better than I did.

profiles.name: Lily
profiles.bio: Lily goes all-in then gets silly. Low weight, high spirit. Often uses modified on big numbers but rarely quits early.
quotesForfeit: I forgot what number we were on.
Can we do a silly card instead?
quotesRespect: Teach me how to do that!

profiles.name: Vic
profiles.bio: Vic leads crews. Shoulder issues limit overhead work—pushups can hurt. Still passes most cards through grit. Kings are his moment.
quotesForfeit: Job site wore me out first.
quotesLegendary: Hard work leaves scars and stories.
quotesHumiliated: Crew would roast me for that.

profiles.name: Elena
profiles.bio: Elena lives in movement. Mountain climbers are easy; heavy pushups less so. High pass rate, low fail—shows students how it's done.
quotesForfeit: I'll stretch and come back stronger.

profiles.name: Frank
profiles.bio: Frank's arms are strong from wrench work. Cardio is not his game. Patient—uses modified without shame. Unlikely to fail turn one.
quotesForfeit: At least I didn't quit first.
quotesClutch: That was rough on the chassis.
quotesHumiliated: I moved like a busted truck.

profiles.name: Zoe
profiles.bio: Zoe climbs on weekends. Pushups and holds are strong suits. Occasionally fails high-rep diamonds when dehydrated.
quotesHumiliated: I peeled off the wall hard.
That was a climber fail moment.

profiles.name: Sam
profiles.tagline: Raised three kids, still showing up.
profiles.bio: Sam moves slow but steady. Uses modified on most cards. Very low fail rate—won't embarrass the grandkids by quitting turn one.
quotesVictory: Still standing after all these years.
quotesForfeit: Need a breather, not a funeral.
Slow and steady… just slower today.
I'll be back after watering the tomatoes.
quotesModified: Still in the garden, still growing.
quotesPain: That took more outta me than expected.
quotesHumiliated: Well… that was a senior moment.
I looked sillier than the grandkids.

profiles.name: Nova
profiles.bio: Nova appears when least expected. Pass and fail rates shuffle slightly each match. The crowd loves the chaos.
quotesForfeit: I threw the round for suspense.
quotesClutch: A near miss makes it exciting.
quotesRespect: Perhaps you belong here after all.

profiles.name: Rex
profiles.bio: Rex spends nights researching hidden agendas and government leaks. Weirdly resilient during endurance rounds, but gets distracted ranting mid-match.

profiles.name: Milo
profiles.tagline: Lives for first editions and hero arcs.
profiles.bio: Milo organizes comics all day and narrates workouts like superhero battles. Not elite physically, but strangely motivated during dramatic moments.
quotesPain: My spine just issued a complaint.
That hit harder than leg day.
quotesHumiliated: That belongs in the blooper issue.
I got folded by the writers.

profiles.name: Brock
profiles.bio: Brock practically lives in the weight room. Incredible strength and stamina, but sometimes burns himself out going too hard too early.
quotesHumiliated: Gym bros never recovering from this.

profiles.name: Iris
profiles.bio: Iris writes late into the night and survives mostly on caffeine and determination. Endurance rounds become internal monologues.

profiles.name: Cole
profiles.bio: Cole pushes through nearly everything with discipline alone. Loud, competitive, and impossible to intimidate.

profiles.name: Hank
profiles.tagline: Built by wilderness and hard mornings.
profiles.bio: Hank spends most of his life outdoors. Quiet endurance, strong grip, and stubborn resilience make him dangerous late game.

profiles.name: Zion
profiles.bio: Zion stays relaxed no matter the pressure. Breathing and pacing are excellent, but explosive exercises aren't his style.

profiles.name: Big Moe
profiles.bio: Big Moe keeps morale high even while struggling through workouts. Surprisingly dangerous in short bursts, terrible in endurance rounds.
quotesForfeit: I saw heaven during that set.
quotesClutch: I barely survived that buffet battle.
quotesHumiliated: I folded like a lawn chair.

profiles.name: Devin
profiles.tagline: Lives on energy drinks and debugging.
profiles.bio: Devin spends most nights coding, gaming, and forgetting to stretch. Weak endurance at first, but learns patterns quickly and adapts fast.

profiles.name: Trish
profiles.tagline: Funny, loud, and impossible to discourage.
profiles.bio: Trish jokes through everything. She struggles with endurance but somehow keeps morale high even when she's exhausted.
quotesPain: I can hear my joints arguing.
quotesClutch: I almost met my ancestors there.
That round tried to assassinate me.

profiles.name: Marcus
profiles.bio: Marcus moves slower than he used to, but refuses to quit easily. Every completed round feels like a victory bigger than the game.
quotesForfeit: Body tapped out before spirit did.
quotesModified: One careful step at a time.

profiles.name: Nina
profiles.tagline: Relearning strength one step at a time.
profiles.bio: Nina spent months bedridden recovering from severe illness. Small movements are major victories, and she approaches every challenge carefully but bravely.
quotesHumiliated: One bad round doesn't define me.
quotesTeamUp: Thank you for waiting on me.
Support helps more than people know.

profiles.name: Sasha
profiles.bio: Sasha thrives during endurance rounds and rarely panics under pressure. Explosive strength isn't her specialty, but stamina is elite.
quotesTeamUp: We'll finish this as a group.
